title: Creeper Nerf
description: Stops creepers from breaking blocks and damaging entities, but adds a lot of knockback!
body:
![Creeper Nerf Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdd94b6438fb1b1dadc51b43641fef52d874de6c.png)

Creeper Nerf changes Creepers for the better! No more annoying environment or entity damage, instead creepers will send everything around them flying! Can be fun, or extremely dangerous...

For more details, see the attached the video below!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/xdd9GU44CYY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Compatibility

Currently compatible with Minecraft 1.21 and up!

# Installation

- Download the datapack
- Place the datapack .zip in the datapacks folder of your world
- Rejoin or run /reload
